title: Token Analysis Report
description: Report generated by @recursica/token-analyzer detailing the usage of CSS variables across adapter components.

summary.description: High-level summary of CSS variable health in the analyzed project.

totalDefined.description: Total number of CSS variables explicitly defined in the scoped UI Kit dictionary.

totalUsed.description: Total number of CSS variables consumed within the adapter's component source files.

totalMissing.description: Number of variables referenced by components that do not exist in the scoped UI Kit dictionary. These represent broken dependencies.

totalUnused.description: Number of variables defined in the scoped UI Kit dictionary that are not consumed by any component. These represent unmapped features or states.

components.description: Master dictionary mapping lowercase component IDs to their source directory and files.

name.description: The human-readable name of the component.

tokenPrefix.description: The string identifier used to match Figma CSS variables to this component (e.g. 'button' for '--recursica_ui-kit_components_button_...').

directory.description: The relative path to the component's root directory.

files.description: Array of source files associated with this component.

brokenComponents.description: List of component IDs that reference at least one missing CSS variable.

missingVariables.description: Detailed list of broken CSS variable references and the component attempting to use them.

variable.description: The exact name of the CSS variable that is missing from the UI Kit dictionary.

componentId.description: The lowercase ID of the component that referenced the broken variable.

files.description: Array of file paths where this missing CSS variable is referenced.

unusedByComponent.description: Dictionary grouping unused CSS variables by their associated component ID.

additionalProperties.description: List of unused CSS variables belonging to this component namespace.
